features: A treat for your lips - these balms will provide long-lasting hydration.
Super cute & fun themed Lip Balms
Our super nourishing peach-scented lip balms leaves your lips 'o so smooth'.
description: Product Description Face Facts Joy Pixels Feeling Peachy Lip Balm is useful for dry, chapped and cracked lips. It also keep your lips fresh and moisturised by applying throughout the day. Flavoured lip balm helps keep your lips moisturised, protected and tasting great all at once. Ingredients Petrolatum, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Paraffinum Liquidum, Synthetic Wax, Ceresin, Caprylic/capric Triglyceride, Microcrystalline Wax, Octyldodecanol, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum. Directions Apply to clean, dry lips throughout the day. Safety Warning May contain allergens. Avoid use if you have known allergies to any ingredients. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. See more
